name: Te Papa
cultural_protocol: Respect taonga and tupuna guidance from source
notes: Live as a rights-aware preview-media onboarding pass. Metadata stays CC BY 4.0, item-level image rights remain attached, and culturally sensitive records should continue to be excluded by default.

name: Auckland Museum
cultural_protocol: Protect taonga, sensitive material, and source protocol flags
notes: Live in ARCHAI now. Needs source-side false-image suppression and a formal terms re-check before bigger expansion.

name: DigitalNZ
cultural_protocol: Aggregator content may carry culturally sensitive legacy descriptions
notes: Excellent for breadth and Pacific/Aotearoa reach, but only safe if we filter by rights and keep partner provenance attached.

name: QAGOMA
image_rights: dataset verified, image reuse recheck recommended
cultural_protocol: Review any Indigenous or culturally sensitive material in downstream records
notes: Strong Australian and Asia-Pacific balancing source. Good dataset shape for onboarding, but image reuse terms should be rechecked at item level before public AUX.IO exposure.

name: National Museum of Australia
image_rights: public domain or CC BY-SA / CC BY-NC-SA via API
cultural_protocol: Source warns that some material is culturally sensitive and may require permission
notes: Strong Australian object source, but its API terms are explicitly non-commercial. Fine for research/demo framing, not for any commercial-facing deployment.

name: WA Museum
quality_gate: verify terms + image reuse + collection stability
cultural_protocol: Expect Aboriginal and sensitive heritage material review needs
notes: Worth pursuing for regional and maritime balance, but legal and API details still need a proper source check.

name: M+
image_rights: CC0 open data where exposed by API
cultural_protocol: Standard museum sensitivity review; excellent multilingual potential
notes: Best next Asia-focused source. Open-data posture is excellent and the collection focus aligns strongly with design, visual culture, and moving image.

name: Tokyo Museum Collection
cultural_protocol: Preserve Japanese and English fields cleanly; obey source-provider media terms
notes: Very good multilingual target. Metadata is open, but media terms can vary by contributing museum, so image gating is essential.

name: National Palace Museum
quality_gate: verify open-data terms + image sizes + language fields
cultural_protocol: Expect multilingual complexity and object-level rights nuance
notes: Potentially strong for historic Asian collections, but needs a proper legal and technical pass before onboarding.

name: National Taiwan Museum of Fine Arts
quality_gate: verify open-data and media rules before public use
cultural_protocol: Preserve Chinese and English text cleanly
notes: Promising art source, but still waiting on a formal legal and technical check.

name: Brasiliana Museus
quality_gate: image-backed + source provenance + item-level rights spot-check
cultural_protocol: Strong diversity gain; keep local context and language intact
notes: Best immediate South American expansion candidate. Broad open-data framing, but spot-check individual object media before large public surfacing.

name: Qatar Museums
quality_gate: verify API access or structured export + media terms
cultural_protocol: High cultural sensitivity; provenance and respectful presentation are critical
notes: Potentially important Middle East source, but not ready until API and reuse terms are properly confirmed.

name: Qatar Digital Library
quality_gate: verify object/media reuse and whether record type fits ARCHAI object model
cultural_protocol: Archive-oriented material may need different UX treatment than object collections
notes: Valuable regional archive source, but likely better for document/knowledge layers than object-heavy AUX.IO first.

name: Computer History Museum
quality_gate: verify developer access and media reuse before harvest
cultural_protocol: Low cultural sensitivity risk, high relevance for media-tech history
notes: Excellent thematic fit for technology objects, but not yet legally or technically verified in this pass.

name: Trove
cultural_protocol: Legacy description and sensitivity checks required
notes: Useful discovery layer for Australian breadth, but better as metadata and reference enrichment than first-wave AUX.IO media source.
